YOUR PREMIERE DESTINATION FOR SPORTS & NIGHTLIFE IN BUCKHEAD, ATLANTA
#1
SPORTS LOUNGE
IN
ATLANTA
Welcome to P Sports Bar & Lounge, where Atlanta nightlife meets luxury sports vibes. Located in Buckhead, we bring you 360° wall-to-wall screens, crafted cocktails, flavorful hookah, and delicious dining. From NFL Sundays to fight nights and signature weekend parties, every moment at P Sports Bar is designed to be unforgettable.
​
For assistance in booking a reservation and questions, please text us
(470-753-4800
.
Every play. Every moment. Elevated.
bottom of page
